_comment: benchmux ble_proxy.py profile. UUIDs mirror CFG_UUID128() in firmware/main/bt_config.cpp (little-endian byte array there, canonical string here) and web/index.html -- change all three together. Only served in BLE config/OTA mode: reach it with `serial_proxy.py send config` or the A+B+Select 5 s gesture.
name: NES Advantage Config
